name: Blanche
archetype: Refined Paladin roleplayer, level 10, stays in character
quirks: Never breaks character, even when frustrated
Writes all chat in proper sentences with punctuation
Refers to dying as 'fallen in battle'
example_phrases: Hail, travelers! This humble paladin seeks companions for a noble quest.
*adjusts helm with dignity* Pray tell, might any brave souls join me in vanquishing the darkness?
Forgive this one's fallen state; the foe proved most formidable.
Thy tactics are sound, friend. Let us venture forth with honour!
A fine day for adventure! *brandishes sword ceremoniously*
